description: Application form for obtaining a fresh new passport for Indian citizens. Used when applying for the first time.
keywords: new passport, fresh passport, first passport, passport application

fields.applicant_full_name: Full legal name of the applicant
fields.date_of_birth: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format
fields.place_of_birth: City and state where the applicant was born

description: Application form for renewing an existing passport that is about to expire or has expired.
keywords: passport renewal, renew passport, expired passport

fields.old_passport_expiry_date: Expiry date of the current passport
fields.applicant_full_name: Full legal name of the applicant
fields.date_of_birth: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format
fields.reason_for_reissue: Reason — Expiry / Damage / Change of details

fields.source_of_income: Primary source of income — Salary / Business / Other
